content.description: Okta authentication activity — sessions, SSO events, failures, top users and apps.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>Okta Authentication Activity Overview</label>
    <description>Okta authentication activity — sessions, SSO events, failures, top users and apps.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{"title": "Okta Authentication Activity Overview", "description": "Okta authentication activity — sessions, SSO events, failures, top users and apps.", "inputs": {"input_global_trp": {"options": {"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "global_time"}, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange"}, "input_outcome": {"options": {"defaultValue": "*", "items": [{"label": "All", "value": "*"}, {"label": "Success", "value": "SUCCESS"}, {"label": "Failure", "value": "FAILURE"}], "token": "outcome"}, "title": "Outcome", "type": "input.dropdown"}, "input_user": {"options": {"defaultValue": "*", "token": "user"}, "title": "User (default: *)", "type": "input.text"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}}}}, "visualizations": {"viz_total_auth": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_total_auth"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Auth Events", "type": "splunk.singlevalue", "description": "Total login attempts in the selected time range"}, "viz_success": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_success"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#3fa21f"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Successful Logins", "type": "splunk.singlevalue", "description": "Logins that completed successfully"}, "viz_failed": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_failed"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Failed Logins", "type": "splunk.singlevalue", "description": "Logins that didn't make it — wrong password, MFA failure, or blocked"}, "viz_sessions": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_sessions"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Session Starts", "type": "splunk.singlevalue", "description": "How many times users opened a fresh Okta session"}, "viz_timechart": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_timechart"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Authentication Events Over Time", "type": "splunk.column", "description": "Login activity over time, broken out by event type"}, "viz_top_apps": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_top_apps"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Top Applications", "type": "splunk.table", "description": "Which apps are seeing the most login traffic"}, "viz_top_users": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_top_users"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Top Users", "type": "splunk.table", "description": "Who is logging in the most"}, "viz_outcome_pie": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_outcome"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Outcome Breakdown", "type": "splunk.pie", "description": "How logins are splitting between success and failure"}, "viz_recent": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_recent"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Recent Okta Authentication Events", "type": "splunk.table", "description": "The last 100 login events — filter by user above to focus on one person"}, "viz_header": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "A real-time view of authentication activity in Okta. Use the filters above to focus on a specific time range, outcome, or user."}, "containerOptions": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false}}, "dataSources": {"ds_total_auth": {"name": "Total auth events", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP | search username=\"$user$\" | search outcome_result=\"$outcome$\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_success": {"name": "Successful logins", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP | search username=\"$user$\" outcome_result=SUCCESS | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_failed": {"name": "Failed logins", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP | search username=\"$user$\" outcome_result=FAILURE | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_sessions": {"name": "Session starts", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | search eventType=user.session.start | search username=\"$user$\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_timechart": {"name": "Auth trend over time", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start OR eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | search username=\"$user$\" | search outcome_result=\"$outcome$\" | eval event_type=case(eventType=\"user.authentication.sso\", \"SSO Login\", eventType=\"user.authentication.auth_via_IDP\", \"Federated Auth (ADFS)\", eventType=\"user.session.start\", \"Session Start\", eventType=\"policy.evaluate_sign_on\", \"Policy Evaluation\", true(), eventType) | timechart span=1h count by event_type", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_top_apps": {"name": "Top applications", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP | search username=\"$user$\" | search outcome_result=\"$outcome$\" | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | where isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" | eval app=case(app=\"unknown\",\"Okta → ADFS Federation Probe\", app=\"SAML 2.0 IdP\" AND username=\"system@okta.com\",\"Okta Health Check\",1=1,app) | stats count by app | sort -count | head 15", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_top_users": {"name": "Top users", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start | search username=\"$user$\" | search outcome_result=\"$outcome$\" | eval username=if(username=\"system@okta.com\",\"Okta System\",username) | search username!=\"\" | stats count by username | sort -count | head 15", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_outcome": {"name": "Outcome breakdown", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start | search username=\"$user$\" | search outcome_result=* | stats count by outcome_result", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_recent": {"name": "Recent auth events", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=client_ip path=\"client.ipAddress\" | spath output=sign_on_mode path=\"debugContext.debugData.signOnMode\" | search eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start | search username=\"$user$\" | search outcome_result=\"$outcome$\" | where app!=\"SAML 2.0 IdP\" AND app!=\"UKG Kronos_Test\" | eval username=if(username=\"system@okta.com\",\"Okta System\",username) | search username!=\"\" | eval idp=case(eventType=\"user.authentication.auth_via_IDP\",\"ADFS → Okta\",1=1,\"Okta\") | table _time, username, eventType, app, idp, outcome_result, client_ip | sort -_time | head 100", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}}, "layout": {"globalInputs": ["input_global_trp", "input_outcome", "input_user"], "layoutDefinitions": {"layout_1": {"options": {"display": "auto", "height": 1440, "width": 2100}, "structure": [{"item": "viz_header", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 2100, "h": 50}}, {"item": "viz_total_auth", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 0, "y": 60}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_success", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 520, "y": 60}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_failed", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 1040, "y": 60}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_sessions", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 540, "x": 1560, "y": 60}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_timechart", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 230}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_top_apps", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 690, "x": 0, "y": 620}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_top_users", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 690, "x": 700, "y": 620}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_outcome_pie", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 700, "x": 1400, "y": 620}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_recent", "position": {"h": 430, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 1010}, "type": "block"}], "type": "absolute"}}, "tabs": {"items": [{"label": "Activity Overview", "layoutId": "layout_1"}]}}}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: Okta Authentication Activity Overview
